claim: No Stable, release, conformance, package-parity, or recorded manual assistive-technology claim is made.

semantics.nativeBasis: Header composition contains an optional skip anchor and breakpoint-exclusive named navigation landmarks with safe real links.
semantics.current: Exactly the matching destination receives aria-current=page.

interaction.keyboard: The mobile disclosure uses a native button; Escape closes it and restores trigger focus.
interaction.routing: Link events are cancellable and no router or history mutation is internal.
interaction.touch: Mobile controls and destinations meet preferred target size.

enhancementIsolation.routeStatusOmitted: No output, live region, aria-busy, data-route-state, text, or status behavior exists.

preferences.forcedColors: Focus and current state map to system colors.
preferences.reducedMotion: Skip-link reveal does not require transition.
preferences.rtl: Layout and panel padding use logical properties.

limitations: Source-present-unreleased records do not include generated parity, packed consumers, or manual assistive-technology evidence.
Consumers own route status accuracy and the skip-link target.
